B[u,v]=\int_{U}\sum_{i,j}a^{i j}u_{x_{i}}v_{x_{j}}d x\mathrm{f o r}u\in H^{1}(U),v\in H_{0}^{1}(U).
By Exercise 5.17,$\phi(u)\in H^{1}(U)$ . Then, for all $v\in C_{c}^{\infty}(U),v\geq0$ ,

\begin{align*}B[\phi(u),v]&=\int_{U}\sum_{i,j}a^{ij}(\phi(u))_{x_i}v_{x_j}dx\\&=\int_{U}\sum_{i,j}a^{ij}\phi'(u)u_{x_i}v_{x_j}dx,\;(\phi'(u)is bounded since u is bounded)\\&=\int_{U}\sum_{i,j}a^{ij}u_{x_i}(\phi'(u)v)_{x_j}-\sum_{i,j}a_{ij}\phi''(u)u_{x_i}u_{x_j}v dx\\&\leq0-\int_{U}\phi''(u)v|Du|^2dx\leq0,\;by convexity of\phi.\end{align*}
(We don'tknow whether the productof two $H^{1}$ functions is weakly differentiable. This is why we do not take $v\in H_{0}^{1}.)$ Now we completetheproof withthe standarddensityargument.

12. Proof Given $u\in C^{2}(U)\cap C(\bar{U})$ with $Lu\leq0$ in U and $u\leq0on\partial U$ .Since $\bar{U}$ is compact and $v\in C(\bar{U}),\;v\geq c>0.\;\mathrm{So}\;w:=\frac{u}{v}\in C^2(U)\cap C(\bar{U})$ .Brutal computationgivesus

\begin{align*}-a^{ij}w_{x_i x_j}&=\frac{-a^{ij}u_{x_i x_j}v+a^{ij}v_{x_i x_j}u}{v^2}+\frac{a^{ij}v_{x_i}u_{x_j}-a^{ij}u_{x_i}v_{x_j}}{v^2}-a^{ij}\frac{2}{v}v_{x_j}\frac{v_{x_i}u-v u_{x_i}}{v^2}\\&=\frac{(L u-b^i u_{x_i}-c u)v+(-L v+b^i v_{x_i}+c v)u}{v^2}+0+a^{ij}\frac{2}{v}v_{x_j}w_{x_i},since a^{ij}=a^{ji}.\\&=\frac{L u}{v}-\frac{u L v}{v^2}-b^i w_{x_i}+a^{ij}\frac{2}{v}v_{x_j}w_{x_i}\end{align*}
M w:=-a^{i j}w_{x_{i}x_{j}}+w_{x_{i}}\big[b^{i}-a^{i j}\frac{2}{v}v_{x_{j}}\big]=\frac{L u}{v}-\frac{u L v}{v^{2}}\leq0\quad\mathrm{o n}\quad\{x\in\bar{U}:u>0\}\subseteq U.
